title: convolvulus malvaeoides
intro: Convolvulus malvaeoides, also known as small bindweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Convolvulus malvaeoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in ointments and salves for topical application.
